member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.DffHandler
member.summary: Wrapper class to wrap IDffService methods used in this file to be able to mock them for unit testing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.DffHandler.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.DffHandler.SetDff(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.ThermalService.IThermalParametricData})
member.summary: SetDff dump data per Pin in dff using token name..
member.param: Index to set data per pin to dump in dff.
ParametricDataPerPin to get data needed to dump in Dff.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.IDffHandler
member.summary: IDffHandler to prepare data to dump in dff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.IDffHandler.SetDff(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.ThermalService.IThermalParametricData})
member.summary: SetDff dump data per Pin in dff using token name.
member.param: Index to set data per pin to dump in dff.
ParametricDataPerPin to get data needed to dump in Dff.

member.summary: Print to Ituff the parametric info of the specified TDAU pins.

member.summary: Gets or sets pins to be used.

member.summary: Gets or sets Dff tokens to be used.

member.summary: Verifies if the PinNames parameter is valid.
member.exception: If the PinNames parameter is invalid.

member.summary: Verifies if the PinNames parameter is valid.
member.exception: If the PinNames parameter is invalid.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the pin to apply a control set change.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name that matches desired index to choose values from.

member.summary: Test Method for reading single thermal measurement.

member.summary: Internal field to store if the continuous read mode is enabled to retrieve its value.

member.summary: Internal field to store datalog selectors for each pin.

member.summary: Gets or sets pins to be used.

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum tolerance value to calculate the high limits of the measurement.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalEndOfTestTestMethod.LowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum tolerance value to calculate the low limits of the measurement.

member.summary: Gets or sets the high temperature limit of a measurement integrity check.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalEndOfTestTestMethod.IntegrityLowLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the low temperature limit of a measurement integrity check.

member.summary: Gets or sets datalog selectors to use for each Pin.

member.summary: Gets or sets the sample rate time in milliseconds in which the continuous read will be performed.

member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.IThermalRampExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method that runs calibration and waits for set point temperature to be reached.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.limitsPerPin
member.summary: Internal field to store limits on a per pin basis.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.RampModeType
member.summary: Enumerated type for selecting Ramp mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.RampModeType.Presoak
member.summary: Run a pre-soak ramp, no ituff printing.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.RampModeType.Normal
member.summary: Run regular ramp process.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.RampModeType.Soak
member.summary: Run ramp for soak.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.RampModeType.Fact
member.summary: Run ramp for Fact.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.PinNames
member.summary: Gets or sets TDAU pins to check.

member.summary: Gets or sets datalog selectors to use for each Pin when printing to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.RampMode
member.summary: Gets or sets Ramp mode (changes print format).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets optional pattern run during soak.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets levels Test Condition used with pattern.

member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.summary: Gets or sets timing Test Condition used with pattern.

member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.summary: Gets or sets set points, use one for all or one per pin.

member.summary: Gets or sets list of tolerance values to calculate the high limits of the measurement.

member.summary: Gets or sets list of tolerance values to calculate the low limits of the measurement.

member.summary: Gets or sets the high temperature limit of a measurement integrity check.

member.summary: Gets or sets the low temperature limit of a measurement integrity check.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Thermal.PrimeThermalRampTestMethod.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets timeout in miliseconds.

member.summary: This functions takes care of formatting data for printing.

member.summary: If TimingTC, LevelTC and PList are defined creates a new functional test object for plistExecutor.

member.summary: Gets or sets the max number of retries once a measurement fails.

member.summary: Gets or sets the delay between retries in ms.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon
member.summary: Class with functions used by single measurement and ramp test methods.

member.summary: Internal field to store the undefined double value.

member.summary: verify if the input tolerance and limits values are in the expected range.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon.CheckIntegerTolerancesRange(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: verify if the input tolerance and limits values are in the expected range.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon.GetToleranceValues(System.String)
member.summary: Get the tolerance values, either form a userVar or directly from user params.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon.GetToleranceValue(System.String)
member.summary: Get the tolerance value, either form a userVar or directly from user params.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon.CheckToleranceListCount(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: check that the number of values in each tolerance list is according to expected.
member.param: number of elements of the low tolerance list.
number of elements of the high tolerance list.
number of elements of the pin list.
member.exception: the input parameter are not right.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon.CheckToleranceListCount(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: check that the number of values in the given tolerance list is expected.
member.param: number of elements of the tolerance list.
number of elements of the pin list.
member.exception: the input parameter are not right.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon.CheckToleranceValues(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that tolerance parameters are not empty.
member.exception: the input parameter are not right.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ThermalCommon.GetSetPointValue(System.String)

member.returns: An integer associated to the value read from SetPointValue uservar.
